base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of world_8_4_layout — a tile (level_layout) from 1985 super mario bros. Final castle — real Bowser fight. Features branching castle-maze ('TO B/C/D/F' pipe labels) + required underwater-maze section accessed via pipe at bottom-right. Correct path: castle. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Final castle — real Bowser fight. Features branching castle-maze ('TO B/C/D/F' pipe labels) + required underwater-maze section accessed via pipe at bottom-right. Correct path: castle → maze branch → underwater room → back-to-castle → axe → real-Bowser-plunge. Princess rescue at axe-bridge end.
